column1: # Every TLA invariant must be tied to real code that confirms it. This maps each
# (spec, invariant) to the concrete anchors that check it: the TLC model, and
# one or more code anchors (a test that runs the real implementation, or the
# source symbol that enforces the invariant). spec_conformance_check.sh verifies
# every anchor below actually exists, so a rename or deletion breaks the build --
# the spec<->code link stops being a comment and becomes an enforced reference.
# kind: tlc | go-test | go-property | go-trace | go-race | servicebacked | loom | go-symbol | ts-test
# columns: spec <TAB> invariant <TAB> kind <TAB> anchor <TAB> path
